titleStmt.title: SII 17.560: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 560. (A.R. No. 517 of 1904.) KĪVAḶŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Sundarakuchāmbā shrine in the Akshayaliṅgēśvara temple.

On palaeographical considerations, this inscription may be assigned to Rājarāja II. The details of date, viz., 10th year, Mēsha, ba. 4, Friday, Mūlam, regularly correspond to 1155 A.D., April 22, Friday, ·85, ·64.

This inscription records some arrangements made for laying a sannadhi-tiruvīdi in front of the temple of god Kēḍili-nāyaṉār of Kīḻvēḷūr, by Arayaṉ Śiṅgapirāṉ of Kīḻakkuḍi and Nārāyaṇadēvaṉ Śavuri-perumāḷ.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ [śrīrāja*]rājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu pattāvatu meṣa nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu caturtiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mulattunāḷ keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭu
brahmadeyam kiḻveḷur Uṭaiyār keṭilināyaṉār koyil tiripuvaṉa Ādicaṇṭe curadevakaṉmikaḷom Iṉṉāṭṭu kiḻakkuṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ ciṅkapirāṉārkkum nārāyaṇa tevaṉ cavuriperumāḷukkum tāṉa
ta paricāvatu nāyaṉārkku muṉpu caṉṉati tiruvitiyilāmaiyil caṉṉatitiruviti kiḻakke viṭṭu kiḻaittiruvitiyum teṟkku nokki muṉpu Eḻuṉtaruḷi Aruḷukiṟa tiruviti yile Uṟaviṭa veṇṭukaiyāle taṅkaḷ kāṇiyāṉa AkamaṉaippuḻaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.560 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
